dns_explorer.domain.ports.iservice module¶

Module

iservice.py

Info

Defines abstract interface for tool services.

class dns_explorer.domain.ports.iservice.IService[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Abstract interface for tool service.

It defines:

attributes:

None.

methods:
explore - Explores DNS subdomains.
check_dns - Executes dns request and reverse DNS lookup for a single domain.
get_records - Queries various DNS records for a domain.
reverse_resolve - Performs reverse DNS lookup on an IP address.
is_initialized - Checks if the service is initialized.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract check_dns(domain: str, verbose: bool = False) → ResolvedDomain | None[source]¶

Executes dns request and reverse DNS lookup for a single domain.

Parameters:

  • domain (<str>) – Domain name to check.

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option.

Returns:

ResolvedDomain instance or None.

Return type:

<ResolvedDomain | None>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract explore(domain: str, cluster: int, verbose: bool = False) → list[ResolvedDomain][source]¶

Explores subdomains of a domain and resolves their DNS and reverse DNS.

Parameters:

  • domain (<str>) – Base domain name to explore.

  • cluster (<int>) – Number of subdomains in cluster to scan.

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose logging.

Returns:

List of resolved domains.

Return type:

<list[ResolvedDomain]>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract get_records(domain: str) → list[DNSRecord][source]¶

Queries various DNS records for a domain.

Parameters:

domain (<str>) – Domain name.

Returns:

List of DNS records.

Return type:

<list[DNSRecord]>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if the service is initialized.

Returns:

True if the service is initialized, False otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract reverse_resolve(ip: str) → list[str][source]¶

Performs reverse DNS lookup on an IP address.

Parameters:

ip (<str>) – IP address to query.

Returns:

List of hostnames.

Return type:

<list[str]>

Exceptions:

None.
